purpose: Legacy debt projection stabilization runtime graph

graph.rule: active accounting-confirmed AR debt ledger rows only

graph.formula: rawBalance = totalDebit - totalCredit; debtAmount = max(rawBalance, 0); creditBalance = max(-rawBalance, 0)

graph.rule: reads backend DTO fields; no available debt rebuild by pending subtraction

tolerancePolicy: DEBT_ZERO_TOLERANCE affects displayStatus only; rawBalance/debtAmount/creditBalance remain explicit projection fields
